top_signals.title: Goldman Cuts Yen Forecast to 165 Per Dollar, Likes Carry Trades
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. sees the yen weakening to 165 per dollar in a year’s time, driven in part by Japan’s interest rate differentials with the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asian Shares Drop on Chips, Dollar Edges Higher: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian equities swung to a loss and US stock futures pared gains as a rebound in regional semiconductor and technology stocks lost momentum. The dollar strengthened.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pakistan Buys More LNG as Flows Through Hormuz Fail to Recover
top_signals.summary: Pakistan bought a liquefied natural gas shipment for delivery later this week, as exports from main supplier Qatar through the Strait of Hormuz remain constrained.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
